name: George Washington Cake
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces Softened Cream Cheese (at room temperature)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs until thick and light.
2. Combine sugar and oil at medium speed.
3. Mix cinnamon with flour.
4. Add the flour mixture to the egg mixture, then add vanilla and walnuts. Mix everything together.
5. Evenly distribute the sliced apples in the bottom of a 2 or 3 quart baking dish.
6. Spread the cake mixture evenly over the apples.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes to 1 hour (watch closely so it doesn't overcook).
8. Mix cream cheese until fluffy, then add butter and mix.
9. Add sugar and lemon juice; mix well.
10. Spread the icing over the cooled cake.
11. Slice apples thin with the peel on; dip in lemon juice.
12. Arrange the apple slices in rows on top of the iced cake.
